channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Wien Floridsdorf ↔ Gänserndorf
item.description: construction works between Gänserndorf train station and Deutsch Wagram train station from Gänserndorf09.2026 (00:10 clock) to 05.10.2026 (04:20 clock) some local trains … [Since 24.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
construction works between Gänserndorf train station and Deutsch Wagram train station from Gänserndorf09.2026 (00:10 clock) to 05.10.2026 (04:20 clock) some local trains …
[Since 24.06.2026]

item.title: REX 51: construction works: no stop in Marchtrenk
item.description: Because of construction works, at Marchtrenk station on 2909.2026 (10:00 o'clock - 15:00 o'clock) and on 01.10.2026 (08:00 o'clock - 11:00 o'clock), no R2, REX50 and REX51 … [Since 24.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works, at Marchtrenk station on 2909.2026 (10:00 o'clock - 15:00 o'clock) and on 01.10.2026 (08:00 o'clock - 11:00 o'clock), no R2, REX50 and REX51 …
[Since 24.06.2026]

item.title: Wien Floridsdorf ↔ Wien Praterstern
item.description: construction works between Wien Floridsdorf train station (U) and Wien Praterstern train station (U) between 1209.2026 to 1309.2026 some local trains cannot operate. [Since 24.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
construction works between Wien Floridsdorf train station (U) and Wien Praterstern train station (U) between 1209.2026 to 1309.2026 some local trains cannot operate.
[Since 24.06.2026]

item.title: 36B/N31: track construction works Brünner Straße
item.description: Due to track construction works in the Brünner Straße, the lines 36B and N31 are redirected. Period: From Tuesday, July 07, 2026 approximately 00:30 o'clock lasting about … [24.06.2026 – 24.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to track construction works in the Brünner Straße, the lines 36B and N31 are redirected. Period: From Tuesday, July 07, 2026 approximately 00:30 o'clock lasting about …
[24.06.2026 – 24.06.2027]

item.title: 29A/29B/N30: Patrizigasse
item.description: Stop change of lines 29A, 29B and N30 towards Großfeldsiedlung U (29A, 29B) and Neu Leopoldau (N30) Stop: Patrizigase From: Freytaggasse32X to: approximately … [24.06.2026 – 24.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of lines 29A, 29B and N30 towards Großfeldsiedlung U (29A, 29B) and Neu Leopoldau (N30) Stop: Patrizigase From: Freytaggasse32X to: approximately …
[24.06.2026 – 24.06.2027]

item.title: 36B/N31: diversion because of track construction works
item.description: Because of track construction works in the Brünner Straße / Trillergasse lines 36B and N31 are being redirected. [07.07.2026 – 11.08.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of track construction works in the Brünner Straße / Trillergasse lines 36B and N31 are being redirected.
[07.07.2026 – 11.08.2027]

item.title: 60A: Bhf. Atzgersdorf S, Knotzenbachgasse
item.description: Stop change of line 60A towards Alterlaa U Stop: Bhf. Atzgersdorf S, Knotzenbachgasse From: KnotzenbachgasseX2XX0ee43c90d193e2X0XXXX0ee43c90d193e2X4X in front of the parking … [23.06.2026 – 31.10.2027]

item.title: S 40: Wien Franz-Josefs-Bahnhof ↔XSt.Andrä-Wördern
item.description: Due to construction works, there are no R Wien Franz-Josefs-Bahnhof and St.Andrä-Wördern trains between 04.07.2026 (02:00 o'clock) and 07.09.2026 (02:00 o'clock) between Wien … [Since 22.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works, there are no R Wien Franz-Josefs-Bahnhof and St.Andrä-Wördern trains between 04.07.2026 (02:00 o'clock) and 07.09.2026 (02:00 o'clock) between Wien …
[Since 22.06.2026]

item.title: 40A: track construction works
item.description: Because of track construction works in the Spitalgasse / Währinger Straße and the increased tram traffic on the Währinger belt, the line 40A is redirected. [13.07.2026 – 22.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of track construction works in the Spitalgasse / Währinger Straße and the increased tram traffic on the Währinger belt, the line 40A is redirected.
[13.07.2026 – 22.08.2026]

item.title: Antonsplatz from 13 to 18
item.description: The pipe laying work is carried out during the night during the unoccupied time of the public transport system, while keeping a minimum of 2,50 m wide residual runway. [18.03.2026 – 29.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work is carried out during the night during the unoccupied time of the public transport system, while keeping a minimum of 2,50 m wide residual runway.
[18.03.2026 – 29.06.2026]
